title: toona sinensis var. hupehana
intro: Toona sinensis var. hupehana, also known as the Chinese toon or Chinese cedar, is a deciduous tree native to China that belongs to the family Meliaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of triterpenoids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Toona sinensis var. hupehana include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of Toona sinensis var. hupehana include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments, such as respiratory issues, skin conditions, and digestive problems.
